frontmatter.title: GitHub profile visit counter - Backend Basics [0]
frontmatter.description: You might have seen counter on GitHub profiles displaying how many visits a profile has, but do you know how they work, join me as I explore several ways to do just that.

frontmatter.title: Accelerating libnbd on linux using io_uring [2] - Project Setup
frontmatter.description: io_uring is the new and better way to do asynchronus I/O on linux, tag along with me on a journey to learn it by doing, on a real life project libnbd!
